title: Search a 2D Matrix
input_format: An `m x n` integer matrix with sorted rows and each row's first integer greater than the last row's last integer. An integer `target`.
output_format: `true` if `target` is in the matrix, `false` otherwise.
constraints:
- `m == matrix.length`
- `n == matrix[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 100`
- `-10^4 <= matrix[i][j] <= 10^4`
- `-10^4 <= target <= 10^4`
function_signature: function searchMatrix(matrix: number[][], target: number): boolean {}
